pipeline_topology.description: Ordered pipeline stages with inputs, outputs, transformation logic, and dependencies between stages

storage.description: Storage decision per stage: input/output stores, intermediate buffers, partitioning strategy

failure_handling.description: Retry policy, dead-letter strategy, and error path per stage — including partial failure behavior

scaling.description: Parallelism model, partitioning approach, and throughput/backpressure constraints per stage

observability.description: Metrics, checkpointing strategy, and lag/progress monitoring per stage

testing_strategy.description: Testing approach: unit per stage, integration at stage boundaries, end-to-end pipeline validation

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements: throughput, latency, data freshness, data loss tolerance

open_questions.description: Unresolved architectural ambiguities blocking the tech stack stage
